compiled_state.title: config-paths.sh spawns 6+ subprocesses per invocation causing slow cold-start in compute-diff-hash.sh
compiled_state.author: Test

comments.body: Discovered during fix for 0e8c-a94d. config-paths.sh calls _cfg_read 6 times at source time, each spawning a separate read-config.sh subprocess (which itself does a git rev-parse). On cold disk (e.g. fresh temp dirs in tests), each subprocess takes ~0.1-0.4s, so config-paths.sh costs ~0.5-2.5s per compute-diff-hash.sh invocation. The compute-diff-hash.sh cold-start overhead also includes a checkpoint-walk loop of up to 10 git log + git rev-parse calls. Solution: consider using --batch mode of read-config.sh to read all config keys in a single subprocess, or cache CFG_* vars via a temp file keyed on git index mtime.
comments.author: Test

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] config-paths.sh uses batch mode or caching to reduce subprocess invocations
- [ ] Verify: time bash plugins/dso/hooks/compute-diff-hash.sh completes in under 3 seconds
- [ ] Existing tests still pass
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: Read config-paths.sh, compute-diff-hash.sh, read-config.sh, and tests. Plan: replace 6 individual _cfg_read subprocess calls with a single read-config.sh --batch invocation. Batch mode outputs all keys as UPPER_CASE_WITH_UNDERSCORES=value lines (eval-safe). Map keys: PATHS_APP_DIR, INTERPRETER_PYTHON_VENV, FORMAT_SOURCE_DIRS, MERGE_VISUAL_BASELINE_PATH, PATHS_SRC_DIR, PATHS_TEST_DIR. Keep _cfg_read/_cfg_read_list as fallback functions for backward compat. Guard against no config file (batch returns empty → all defaults). Need to handle list mode (format.source_dirs) specially since batch outputs single-line but we need newline-separated.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT COMPLETE: Optimized config-paths.sh from 6 subprocess invocations to 2. Implementation: single read-config.sh --batch call replaces 5 individual _cfg_read calls; one --list call handles multi-value format.source_dirs. Batch intermediates (PATHS_APP_DIR etc.) are unset after use to prevent environment pollution. Tests: 28/28 pass (19 existing + 9 new tests covering batch correctness, absent-key defaults, and environment leak prevention). compute-diff-hash.sh timing: 0.51s (well under 3s AC). Files modified: plugins/dso/hooks/lib/config-paths.sh, tests/hooks/test-config-paths.sh.
comments.author: Test
